{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Empty
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The symbol for "[[Empty]]" exists in the old language.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|wearing his own badge, though his had the symbol for “Empty” in the old language.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Language and scripts]]
